intent: Canonical SOURCE of the model law. lgwks_model_mesh.MESH_LAW is GENERATED from this file by scripts/gen_model_law.py (--verify is the CI gate). Records inventory; does not change it. Edit HERE, never the generated block, never the spec prose alone.

spec_divergences.prose_purpose: GUI Agent. Operates terminal/GUI via screenshots.
spec_divergences.resolution: The v1-locked embed current_law is Qwen/Qwen3-VL-Embedding-8B — an EMBEDDER, sourced from FINALIZATION §3 — not the VL visual agent the Aetherius §3 prose names. The visual-agent reading is carried as a candidate_reference (mlx-community/Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct-4bit), NOT promoted: embedding and GUI-operation are different capabilities. The prose version '3.7' is drift (no such release); the candidate id is the corrected MLX repo id. Recorded so the prose<->law gate PASSES on this known divergence and FAILS on any NEW one.

prose_table.purpose: Deterministic BLAKE3 CIDs and CRDT Algebra.
8k Task-Salience Encoder. Maps 'slop' to tool intents.
GUI Agent. Operates terminal/GUI via screenshots.
The Stay Model. Deep Architectural Resolve.
